title: Lanse's Combined Challenges
description: This mod combines a lot of my challenge mods together into 1. Can you survive?
body:
This mod combines a lot of my challenge mods together into 1. This includes:

-WallSpike: If you touch a wall, you die.

-NuclearStorm: Creates a nuclear storm where it it rains acid, and trees decay.

-LavaStorm: Lava rains from the sky and burns you and the world.

-Blizzard: Creates a blizzard which will pile up snow infinitely, freeze you, and convert new mobs into strays.

-WorldCorruptor: Creates a storm that slowly destroys your world.

-FloorIsLava: Wherever you walk turns into lava.

-MidasTouch: Wherever you walk turns into gold.

-PotionRain: Creates a Potion rain or Potion Death Ray.

-LightningWorld: Lightning strikes every entity each minute.

-MobExploder: All mobs explode on death.

-MobDoubler: All mobs double every minute.

More to come soon!

All commands start with LCP_ , and each of these challenges can be turned on individually.

If you are looking to spice up your world and try a challenge, then this is for you.
Can you survive?
